title: phyllanthus excisus
intro: Phyllanthus excisus, also known as Sandersonia or Sandersonia aurantiaca, but is actually Phyllanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including liver and kidney problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus excisus include its ability to protect the liver from damage, improve kidney function, and potentially reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus excisus is often used to make teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support liver and kidney health, as well as to boost the immune system.
